query:
INSERT INTO `podcast_shows` (`slug`, `title`, `subtitle`, `description`, `host_persona`, `host_name`, `cover_image_url`, `theme_color`, `schedule_day`, `schedule_time`, `schedule_timezone`, `is_active`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) VALUES
('candys-corner', 'Candy''s Corner', 'Real Talk with Seabrun Candy Hunter', 'Candy''s Corner is where real conversations happen. Hosted by the spirit of Seabrun Candy Hunter, this podcast brings warmth, wisdom, and straight talk about family, legacy, music, and the journey of Canryn Production.', 'candy', 'Candy AI', NULL, '#3b82f6', 'Tue/Thu', '7:00 PM', 'CT', 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('solbones', 'Solbones Podcast', 'Sacred Math, Healing Frequencies & Dice', 'The Solbones Podcast explores the intersection of sacred mathematics, Solfeggio healing frequencies, and the Solbones 4+3+2 dice game. Hosted by Seraph AI, each episode dives deep into frequency science, gameplay strategy, and spiritual wellness.', 'seraph', 'Seraph AI', NULL, '#f59e0b', 'Wed/Sat', '8:00 PM', 'CT', 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('around-the-qumunity', 'Around the QumUnity', 'Community Voices, QUMUS Power', 'Around the QumUnity is the community-driven podcast where listeners become the show. Hosted by Valanna, this podcast spotlights community stories, QUMUS ecosystem updates, Sweet Miracles initiatives, and the people building the future together.', 'valanna', 'Valanna', NULL, '#a78bfa', 'Mon/Fri', '6:00 PM', 'CT', 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
